sub_pixel_system.notes: Turn-based RPG; sub-pixel movement not applicable to gameplay mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses turn-based action-point system for movement and actions. Movement is not real-time; characters move in discrete turns determined by action point allocation.

special_mechanics.name: Action Point System
special_mechanics.description: Movement and actions consume action points, number determined by agility statistic and perks. Different actions have different point costs.

tier_notes: Fallout 2 is a turn-based isometric RPG with trimetric perspective. Real-time physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are not applicable as movement is governed by turn-based action-point mechanics rather than continuous physics simulation. Player movement is determined by the agility statistic and perks, not kinematic physics.
